wave: 2 — pilot corpus (#307). 25 queries against production agentopia-architecture scope. Chunk indices verified from live Qdrant. Labels assigned by engineer review of text_preview + section.
description: Wave 2 labeled evaluation dataset for #307 SA-KB pilot verification. Uses production pilot corpus (20 docs, 485 chunks). Labels: 2=fully relevant, 1=partially relevant, 0=irrelevant (unjudged defaults to 0).

grading_scale.0: irrelevant — chunk has no useful information for the query
grading_scale.1: partially relevant — chunk contains related but incomplete information
grading_scale.2: fully relevant — chunk directly answers or substantially addresses the query
